scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:worker && bun run build:plugin
scripts.test: bun run test:shared && bun run test:worker && bun run test:plugin && bun run test:root
scripts.pack: bun run build && bun run --filter @iina-watch-party/plugin pack
scripts.link: bun run build && bun run --filter @iina-watch-party/plugin link
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bun run --filter @iina-watch-party/worker deploy
